_comment: Pinned engine ref that astrolabe_callbacks/contract.py was vendored from. To update, edit `vendored_from` and run `python tools/vendor-contract.py`. CI enforces that the in-tree file matches this ref. Initial pin is a SHA on the engine's `dev` branch because no engine release tag carries contract.py yet — switch to a tag (e.g. astrolabe@v1.8.0) once one ships.
